nonPassingAttempts: A broad Quant pytest invocation collected duplicate and third-party modules; the repository-authoritative tests directory with importlib mode was then used.
The first authoritative Quant run lacked the bundled Git directory in PATH; the test process PATH was corrected without changing repository configuration.
The first local browser health request timed out during server warmup; the subsequent health and UI checks passed.
The initial 390px screenshot exposed a redundant floating back button; the mobile-only style was corrected and regression-tested.
